message.thinking:
We need to answer each of the evaluation questions with JSON objects. The array must contain exactly 3 objects, one per question. Each object has keys: "question", "feedback", "complies". The "question" field should contain a one-word string: "Chapters", "Description", or "Structure" depending on which question. Provide feedback: highlight problems or strengths. "complies" boolean.

We have the text: a table of tasks with dates. The questions:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text lists activities, not chapters. So it does not list main sections. So compliance false. Feedback: It lists tasks but not chapters. So mention that.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? The text does not describe contents of each section; it's just a schedule. So compliance false. Feedback: no description.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? The schedule gives timeline but not structure. So compliance false. Feedback: structure unclear.

Thus all false. Provide array of 3 objects. Ensure JSON format. No extra text.
